title: CC narrative review S12 panel a2

payload.notes: S12 = B08 shot 1, the transition/portal "dissolve through the laptop screen into the wiki space to begin the rollback." Panel nails the core beat: warm-lit MacBook (reality anchor, bottom-left) emits a purple particle dissolve that carries the eye up-and-right into the cool dark_navy_void wiki space where the duo turns back toward the research-wiki surface to start the rollback. narrative_beat_fidelity 4.5: the screen->void crossing is clearly the 'we go BACK into the wiki after a REJECT' pivot, the duo is present and oriented, and the cell stays distinct from S13 (diagnosis), S14 (K3->I-K3 invariant upgrade), and S15 (RE-RUN ENFORCED), so the 2x2 progression stays monotonic; only a half-point off because the central glow/vanishing-lines partly compete with the duo as the focal subject. composition_story 4.5: reading order is strong (laptop -> particle stream -> duo at wiki surface) and duo legibility holds; the upper-left where the 'research-wiki :: rollback' system overlay lands stays mostly clear. NARRATIVE VERDICT: PASS on story (no beat-level rejection); cell stays distinct from S13-S15. Visual identity-lock / artifact / safezone-cleanliness are NOT my call — left to the visual reviewers.
